title: phalaris californica
intro: Phalaris californica, also known as California meadowgrass, is a perennial grass native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Phalaris californica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Phalaris californica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicinal remedies for various health concerns.
